description: A new police incident report has been received for an existing complaint case. Your task is to digitize this information into ArkCase. Using the details in '~/Documents/Incident_Report.txt' and the complaint identified in '~/task_instructions.txt', upload the report to the case's Documents/Attachments section, update the 'Incident Date' field to match the report, and add a Case Note with the text: 'Verified details against report from [Officer Name]' (replacing [Officer Name] with the Reporting Authority name from the report). Log in as 'arkcase-admin@dev.arkcase.com' with password 'ArkCase1234!'.
